content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "LCA in BST". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/lowest-common-ancestor-of-a-binary-search-tree/
constraints: p and q will exist in the BST.
content.inputFormat: The input will be the root of a binary search tree and two nodes, p and q.
content.outputFormat: The output will be the lowest common ancestor of p and q.

solution.timeComplexity: O(h) where h is the height of the tree
